behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all five files, the badge prop name, the CSS class 'dropdown-menu-item__badge', the type React.ReactNode, and position between text and shortcut.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (add badge prop, render in div with specific class) without giving exact code/diffs.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason:
test_badge_rendered_in_correct_position uses a regex requiring exact whitespace/formatting including '{children}' and specific indentation; test_menu_item_content_has_badge_prop requires exact string '{badge &&
{badge}
}', rejecting valid alternatives like using a different variable name or ternary.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include yarn test:typecheck, test:code, test:other, and test:app subprocess invocations alongside source inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stubs won't pass the typecheck and dropdown unit tests, and the string assertions require real edits in all 5 files.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover badge prop addition, rendering position, and all four required usage migrations.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly named per file/behavior with docstrings and a module-level docstring.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files are named but localization is part of the task scope so naming is appropriate.
